positive: A detailed, symmetrical illustration featuring bioluminescent celestial flora interwoven with deep-sea coral structures. The composition is a central, stylized mandala design against a void background. Use clean line art and strong, contrasting silhouettes. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, vibrant emerald green, electric cyan, and pops of neon magenta, giving a mystical, ethereal glow. The style should mimic intricate woodcut engravings combined with modern vector illustration, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Focus on perfect symmetry and high decorative density, emphasizing the contrast between the dark background and the luminous subject matter. Full body portrait format, overhead view.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low detail, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, sloppy, graffiti, childish, monochrome, realistic photography
